name: Luppi Antenor
description: Luppi Antenor (ルピ・アンテノール, Rupi Antenōru) was the Sexta (6th) Espada in Sousuke Aizen's army having temporarily replaced Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez before his death at the latter's hands. He was later resurrected by Mayuri Kurotsuchi and became a member of the Twelfth Division's Corpse Unit.
creator: Lukas Netero
